title: Keyword Research Input
description: Configure seed keywords, language, and scoring options.

keywords.title: Seed Keywords
keywords.description: List of seed keywords to expand. Each keyword generates multiple autocomplete suggestions.

topN.title: Top N Results
topN.description: Number of top-ranked keyword suggestions to output (1-200). Keywords are ranked by longtail score.

maxQuestionPatterns.title: Question Pattern Variants Per Seed
maxQuestionPatterns.description: Number of question/intent suffix variants to generate per seed keyword (e.g., 'keyword + how to', 'keyword + best'). Max 12.

requestDelaySeconds.title: Request Delay (seconds)
requestDelaySeconds.description: Delay in seconds between Google Suggest API requests to avoid rate limiting.
